## Why
What problem does this solve?

## Proposed behavior
What should be added and why.

## Area
- [ ] Tally
- [ ] DSC

## Impact
- [ ] New capability
- [ ] User experience improvement
- [ ] Performance or reliability
- [ ] Security or privacy
- [ ] Cross-platform compatibility

## Platform scope
- [ ] Windows
- [ ] macOS
- [ ] Platform-independent

Describe host-specific dependencies or behavior.

## Security, privacy, and migration impact
Describe data handled, endpoint or credential changes, compatibility concerns,
and rollback requirements. Use synthetic examples only.

## Alternatives considered
What alternatives did you evaluate?
